panels.description: Wide shot: Young Mowgli playing in a lush, sun-drenched jungle clearing, interacting with wolf cubs, swimming in a forest pool, serene and adventurous atmosphere, vibrant greenery, dappled sunlight.

bubbles.text: Mowgli grew among the cubs, learning the language of the jungle—the rustle, the breath of the wind, the hidden pulse of the wild.

panels.description: Medium action shot: Bagheera (panther) perched on a high branch, calling down to Mowgli. Below, Mowgli is deftly leaping through the dense branches, looking agile and wild.
Medium close-up: Mowgli sitting in a calm spot, gently pulling a thorn from a wolf's paw. Detailed focus on the bond between the human boy and the wolf. Soft, warm lighting.
Medium shot: Bagheera standing tall in the shadows of the forest, looking sternly at Mowgli. Bagheera is mid-explanation regarding the Law of the Jungle. Mowgli listens with focused, obedient eyes.

bubbles.text: The jungle is thine... but for the price of the bull that bought thee, thou must never kill cattle. That is the Law.

panels.description: Low angle wide shot: Shere Khan (the tiger) pacing near the Council Rock, looming over younger, impressionable wolves while a feeble, distant Akela looks on. Ominous atmosphere, deep shadows, threatening posture from the tiger.

bubbles.text: Why follow a dying wolf and a man's cub? You are hunters, not servants.
